heading: Judgment funds
label: 4023 Judgment funds
notes: References in TextThe Indian Judgment Funds Use or Distribution Act, referred to in subsec. (b), probably means the Indian Tribal Judgment Funds Use or Distribution Act, , , , which is classified generally to chapter 16 (§ 1401 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 93–13487 Stat. 466Oct. 19, 1973

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to approve plans under for the withdrawal of judgment funds held by the Secretary.section 4022 of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: b Limitation
children.text: Only such funds held by the Secretary under the terms of the Indian Judgment Funds Use or Distribution Act [ et seq.] or an Act of Congress which provides for the secretarial management of such judgment funds shall be included in such plans.25 U.S.C. 1401
that the purpose and use of the judgment funds identified in the previously approved judgment fund plan will continue to be followed by the Indian tribe in the management of the judgment funds; and
that only funds held for Indian tribes may be withdrawn and that any funds held for individual tribal members are not to be included in the plan.
